title: Bill Wray
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Bill Wray''' (born [[1950s|1958]]) is comic artist who inked a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series. Wray started out in the animation industry and soon found work in the comics industry for various publishers. Wray is best known for his work on [[Wikipedia:The Ren & Stimpy Show|''The Ren & Stimpy Show'']] as well as his ongoing strips for [[Wikipedia:Mad Magazine|''Mad Magazine'']].

{{Artist-stub}}
